channel.title: Welcome to my site. on James Akl
channel.description: Recent content in Welcome to my site. on James Akl

item.title: Defining a Robot
item.description: In this article we will attempt to define a robot by examining the underlying conditions that distinguish robotic systems. It is impossible to satisfy all opinions with one definition, but being objectively right is not the goal. Instead, the aim is to better understand the nuances surrounding robots. History The word robot has literary origins (specifically, Czech) meaning forced labor. In our context, this essentially implies that a robot is a machine-slave.

item.title: About
item.description: Hello, reader! I am a roboticist with a background in engineering, mathematics, and science. Aside from robotics, I am also invested in mathematics and music on the private side; and in business and finance on the social side. I study people as much as I study robots, so I like working, learning, and sharing with ambitious teams and decent individuals. I often think about the socioeconomic and humanities aspects of robots.
